title: Classic scrambled eggs
instructions: Whisk eggs with milk. Melt butter in pan over low heat. Add eggs, stir gently until just set. Top with cheese.

title: Cheese omelette
instructions: Beat eggs. Cook in buttered pan. Add cheese, bell pepper and onion before folding.

title: Tomato egg stir fry
instructions: Scramble eggs and set aside. Stir fry tomato and onion. Combine with eggs and soy sauce.

title: Chicken and vegetable stir fry
instructions: Slice chicken and vegetables. Stir fry chicken first, add vegetables, season with soy sauce.

title: Grilled chicken with lemon
instructions: Marinate chicken in lemon juice and mustard. Grill until cooked through. Finish with butter.

title: Caesar salad
instructions: Make dressing from mayo, mustard, lemon and egg yolk. Toss with lettuce and parmesan.

title: Pasta with tomato sauce
instructions: Cook pasta. Saute onion and tomato for sauce. Toss pasta with sauce, top with cheese and butter.

title: Grilled cheese sandwich
instructions: Butter bread slices. Layer cheese between them. Grill in pan until golden and cheese melts.

title: Avocado toast
instructions: Toast bread. Mash avocado with lemon juice. Spread on toast. Top with a poached egg.

title: Yogurt and berry parfait
instructions: Layer yogurt and mixed berries in a glass. Repeat layers. Serve chilled.

title: Spinach and egg frittata
instructions: Saute spinach and onion in butter. Pour in beaten eggs. Top with cheese. Bake at 180C until set.

title: Carrot and ginger soup
instructions: Saute onion in butter. Add carrots and water. Simmer until soft. Blend and finish with lemon.

title: Chicken quesadilla
instructions: Cook chicken and peppers. Fill tortilla with chicken, peppers, and cheese. Grill until golden. Serve with sour cream.

title: Beef and mushroom stir fry
instructions: Slice beef thin. Stir fry with mushrooms and onion. Season with soy sauce and finish with butter.

title: Classic egg salad sandwich
instructions: Hard boil eggs, chop. Mix with mayo and mustard. Serve on bread with lettuce.

title: Cheesy baked potato
instructions: Bake potato until soft. Split open, add butter and cheese. Serve with sour cream.

title: Tomato and cheese omelette
instructions: Beat eggs. Cook in butter. Add diced tomato and cheese before folding.

title: Lemon butter chicken
instructions: Brown chicken in butter. Add lemon juice, mustard, and a splash of milk for sauce. Simmer until cooked.

title: Spinach and cheese pasta
instructions: Cook pasta. Make white sauce from butter, milk, and cheese. Stir in spinach. Toss with pasta.

title: Mushroom and egg scramble
instructions: Saute mushrooms in butter. Add beaten eggs and scramble gently. Top with cheese.

title: Chicken Caesar wrap
instructions: Grill chicken. Make caesar dressing from mayo and lemon. Wrap chicken, lettuce, cheese in tortilla.

title: Berry smoothie bowl
instructions: Blend yogurt, banana and berries. Pour into bowl. Top with extra fresh berries.

title: Tomato soup with grilled cheese
instructions: Cook tomato and onion in butter. Blend, add milk. Serve with grilled cheese sandwich.

title: Potato and egg hash
instructions: Dice and fry potatoes in butter. Add onion and bell pepper. Make wells and crack eggs in. Cover until set.

title: Greek salad
instructions: Chop tomato and lettuce. Cube feta cheese. Dress with lemon juice. Add olives and pickles.

title: Banana pancakes
instructions: Mash banana with eggs and a splash of milk. Cook small pancakes in butter until golden.

title: Chicken soup
instructions: Simmer chicken with carrot and onion. Remove chicken, shred. Return to pot. Finish with lemon juice.

title: Avocado egg salad
instructions: Hard boil eggs. Mash avocado with lemon and mustard. Fold in chopped egg and mayo.

title: Mushroom risotto
instructions: Saute onion and mushroom in butter. Add rice and broth gradually. Finish with cheese and milk.

title: Blueberry yogurt muffins
instructions: Mix wet ingredients (egg, yogurt, butter, milk). Fold in dry ingredients and blueberries. Bake at 180C for 20 mins.

title: Beef tacos
instructions: Brown ground beef. Season with spices. Fill tortillas with beef, tomato, lettuce, cheese. Top with sour cream and hot sauce.

title: Spinach omelette
instructions: Wilt spinach and onion in butter. Beat eggs and pour over. Add cheese and fold when set.

title: Chicken and avocado salad
instructions: Grill and slice chicken. Toss with lettuce and avocado. Dress with lemon, mayo and mustard.

title: Soy glazed chicken
instructions: Marinate chicken in soy sauce, lemon and mustard. Pan fry in butter until cooked and glazed.

title: Apple and yogurt breakfast bowl
instructions: Slice apple. Arrange over yogurt. Top with blueberries. Drizzle with honey if available.

title: Potato soup
instructions: Cook potato and onion in butter. Add milk and simmer until soft. Blend partially. Top with cheese.

title: BLT sandwich
instructions: Toast bread. Spread mayo and mustard. Layer lettuce, tomato. Serve open or closed.

title: Mushroom and spinach saute
instructions: Saute onion in butter. Add mushrooms until golden. Stir in spinach and soy sauce until wilted.

title: Strawberry cream cheese toast
instructions: Toast bread. Spread cream cheese generously. Top with sliced fresh strawberries.

title: Chicken and mushroom pasta
instructions: Cook pasta. Saute chicken and mushrooms in butter. Make cream sauce with milk and cheese. Combine all.
